positive: A stylized geometric pattern featuring interconnected golden mandalas and crystalline celestial bodies set against a deep indigo and burnt orange gradient background. The design should incorporate clean, thick lines, strong radial symmetry, and abstracted nature elements like crescent moons, stylized hummingbirds, and interwoven vines. The style must be highly graphic and luxurious, resembling modern Art Deco meets Bohemian tribal art. Composition should be centered and highly repeatable, optimized for a full-chest print on apparel. Lighting is dramatic, suggesting illuminated gold leaf textures against a velvet night sky. Use a high contrast, limited color palette of gold, deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream.
negative: blur, low detail, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, amateur drawing, low contrast, grayscale, gradient bleeding
